sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40149 — SYRIA. Seleukid Kingdom. Cleopatra Thea & Antiochos VIII, 125-96 B.C. AR Tetradrachm (16.71 gms), Damaskos Mint, dated SE 191 (122/1 B.C.). NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Scratches.
To view all
sales.description:
SYRIA. Seleukid Kingdom. Cleopatra Thea & Antiochos VIII, 125-96 B.C. AR Tetradrachm (16.71 gms), Damaskos Mint, dated SE 191 (122/1 B.C.). NGC Ch VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Scratches.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
HGC-9, 1182d; SC-2267.1. Obverse: Jugate heads right; Reverse: Zeus Nikephoros seated left; monogram to outer left and below throne; date in exergue. Struck on a broad round flan. Only moderate, even circulation, and with a handsome cabinet ...
